hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
accommodation_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"Atour S Hotel  Expo Center Lujiazui Shanghai"}<=accommodation_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
inner_city_transportation_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    inner_city_transportation_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(inner_city_transportation_cost<=110)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: We are a group of 4 traveling from Shenzhen to Shanghai for 3 days, and need to meet at least one of the following conditions: 1. Stay at the hotel Atour S Hotel Expo Center Lujiazui Shanghai 2. Have a budget of 110.0 for local transportation.
